changes.text: Rebuilt the mobile navigation with a hamburger menu.
Changed the commands area into a paginated table that renders 10 commands per page.
Added skeleton loading states for live stats, commands and changelog content.
Polished command details, footer styling and Discord preview metadata.
Updated command cards with expandable details.
Updated the homepage navigation for the changelog.
Added the live commands page with search and category filtering.
Added public, admin and owner visibility badges for commands.
Connected the website to the bot API for live stats.
Added bot name, server count, user count, ping and uptime.
